sidebar.promo: Professional care for your cardiovascular health
sidebar.loadingTip: Mingming is studying hard — stay tuned!

welcome.desc: Your cardiovascular health AI assistant. I can help you understand symptoms and assess urgency.
tips: Regular sleep habits are important for your heart.
A daily 30-minute walk supports cardiovascular health.
Less salt and oil helps keep blood pressure steady.
Stay calm — big mood swings stress the heart.
Don't ignore chest tightness; ask early if worried.
Quitting smoking is one of the best gifts for your heart.
welcome.input: Please describe your symptoms or health concerns...
welcome.chip1: What should I do about chest tightness?
welcome.chip2: What to know about high blood pressure?
welcome.chip3: How to read my ECG results?
welcome.footer: This platform provides AI-assisted consultation suggestions and cannot replace a doctor's diagnosis. Seek medical care if symptoms are severe or persistent.

chat.input: Describe your symptoms, Mingming is here to help...
chat.sendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again.
chat.multimodalTip: Mingming is learning multimodal — stay tuned!
chat.deleteSessionConfirm: This cannot be undone. All messages in this session will be removed. Continue?

ai.name: Mingming
ai.disclaimer: This response is for health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis or prescription. Seek medical care if needed.

records.title: Consultation Records
records.listEmpty: No sessions yet. Start from home or tap New Consultation.
records.empty: Select or start a consultation session
records.emptyHint: Enter symptoms on the home page, or tap New Consultation on the left.
records.generationHintLogin: Sign in to consult; guest sessions are not saved as records.
records.generationHintMessages: Each session needs enough dialogue (typically more than 20 messages) before it is summarized.
records.generationHintIdle: About one hour after your last message, we automatically compile the chat into a topic, urgency level, and summary.
records.generationHintOngoing: Active chats do not appear here immediately—you can keep chatting or check back later.
records.archivingTipAccount: Records are tied to your account and visible only to you; guest sessions are not archived.
records.archivingTipWhen: A record is created after enough dialogue and about one hour without new messages.
records.archivingTipEndedAt: "Ended" is when archiving finished, not necessarily when you sent your last message.

helpPage.title: Help
helpPage.subtitle: Welcome to the Cardiology Intelligent Consultation Platform. Here is a quick guide from Mingming to help you get started.
helpPage.notice: Important: Information on this platform is for health reference only and does not replace professional medical diagnosis or prescriptions. For emergencies such as chest pain, breathing difficulty, or loss of consciousness, call emergency services immediately.

sections.title: 1. Sign in
items: Click the avatar area in the top-right to sign in with your phone number and SMS code.
First-time users are registered automatically. Without a nickname, your display name defaults to “User” plus the last 4 digits of your phone.
Guest mode is available for a quick trial, with usage limits.

sections.title: 2. Start a consultation
items: On the home page, describe your symptoms and tap “Start consultation”.
You can also click “New consultation” in the sidebar to create a blank session.
Be as specific as possible: symptoms, duration, triggers, and medical history.

sections.title: 3. Chat with Mingming
items: Type your symptoms in the input box at the bottom and send.
Mingming’s replies include urgency labels (green / yellow / red) for reference.
Image upload is coming soon.

sections.title: 4. Manage sessions
items: The sidebar lists past sessions, 5 per page with pagination at the bottom.
Use the search box to filter by title or preview text.
Swipe a session left to pin or delete. Deletion requires confirmation.
Pinned sessions appear at the top of the list.

sections.title: 5. Message history
items: Opening a session shows the latest messages and scrolls to the bottom.
Scroll to the top to load earlier messages, 40 at a time.
Switching sessions reloads that session’s history.

privacyPage.title: Privacy
privacyPage.subtitle: The Cardiology Intelligent Consultation Platform takes the security of your personal and health-related information seriously. This notice explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacyPage.notice: Internal test notice: The current build is for internal testing. Some features (smart appointment booking, medical records, health reports) are not yet available. Before enabling features that require your ID number, we will prompt you again and ask for your explicit consent.

sections.title: 1. Scope
items: This notice applies when you use sign-in, AI consultation, session management, and related services on this platform.
If you later use smart appointment booking, medical records, or health reports, this notice and any feature-specific rules also apply.
In guest mode, we collect only the minimum information needed for a limited trial experience.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
items: Account data: phone number, SMS verification records, optional nickname, and login session identifiers.
Consultation data: symptom descriptions, chat messages with Mingming, session titles and previews, and message timestamps.
Device and logs: basic technical data such as access time, browser type, and API request logs to keep the service secure and stable.

Future feature data: when you use smart appointment booking, medical records, or health reports, we may collect name, national ID number, care provider, and test reports as required by each feature. Details will be shown on the consent screen when the feature launches.

sections.title: 3. ID number and other sensitive personal information
items: Your national ID number is legally classified as sensitive personal information. The current v0.1 internal test does not require it.

Upcoming smart appointment booking needs identity verification and hospital integration; medical records need to link visits and tests to you; health reports must be tied to the correct personal record—all may require your real name and ID number.
We collect ID numbers only when necessary for those features and do not use them for unrelated marketing or sharing.
Sensitive data such as ID numbers is stored with encryption and access controls; displayed values are masked when possible.
We do not provide your ID number to unrelated third parties unless required by law or with your separate consent.

sections.title: 4. How we use information
items: To provide core services: sign-in, AI consultation, session storage, and history lookup.
To improve reply quality and product experience (during internal testing, data may be used in de-identified or aggregated form for troubleshooting and optimization).
After related features launch, to verify identity, link records, generate reports, and show them to you.
To comply with legal obligations and address security risks, fraud, or abuse.

sections.title: 5. Storage and security
items: Your data is stored on servers located in the People’s Republic of China with appropriate safeguards.
We use encryption in transit, access control, and least-privilege practices to protect your information.
Consultation records are linked to your account; you can delete individual sessions from the session list.
During internal testing or product changes, logs may be retained for the minimum period required by law. Account deletion and data export will follow product capabilities when available.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
items: You may learn how we process your personal information through this page and in-product links.
You may update account details such as your nickname when settings become available.
You may delete consultation sessions; contact us through in-product feedback to request account deletion or data export/deletion.
For sensitive data such as ID numbers, we will explain the purpose and obtain consent before collection. You may refuse, but features that depend on that data may be unavailable.

sections.title: 7. Sharing, transfer, and disclosure
items: We do not sell your personal information.
Smart appointment booking may require sharing necessary patient details with partner hospitals or booking platforms, limited to what is needed to complete an appointment and governed by agreements.
We may disclose information when required by law, legal process, or competent authorities.

sections.title: 8. Updates and contact
items: We may update this notice from time to time; material changes will be highlighted in the product.
If you have questions about this notice or how we handle personal information, contact us through in-product feedback or the platform operator.
Continued use means you have read and understood this notice; new features involving sensitive personal information will require separate explicit consent.
